name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-91
title: Three-way version mismatch: feature.json 3.12.0 / spec.md 3.13.0 / contract.md 4.0.0
description: rabbit-cage manifests declare three different versions: feature.json=3.12.0, spec.md=3.13.0, contract.md=4.0.0. The spec_no_change_reason field in feature.json narrates the spec bump to 3.13.0 but the top-level version was not bumped. Designed Deprecation principle violated. Fix: pick correct version (likely 4.0.0 since contract.md leads), sync all three locations, add a test asserting feature.json/spec.md/contract.md version alignment for rabbit-cage.
